series_metadata.series_description: File contains individual names with social security numbers and text concerning individuals who have had permits revoked, rejected and/or criminal records.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain machine-readable records on the computer database until superseded or until record series is no longer created, and then destroy by erasure. ; Paper: Maintain hard copy in the operting area until entered into the database and then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
